commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a macOS launchd install-time guard that refuses to write/bootstrap a user LaunchAgent when a same-label system LaunchDaemon is loaded or its plist exists, with focused launchd tests.

PR surface: Source +48, Tests +75. Total +123 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level with live reporter evidence. Current main and v2026.6.10 still write and bootstrap only the gui-domain LaunchAgent, while the linked issue shows the system LaunchDaemon plus user install path; I did not run a live macOS mutation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action is contributor or maintainer validation: add real macOS proof and decide whether the fail-closed install behavior is acceptable before merge; no automated code repair is indicated.
